changelog: === 2.8.0 (2026-07-22) — Mode ON/OFF Auto-Blacklist & Strike Reset ===
Feature: Added ON/OFF toggle mode for Auto-Blacklist no-show strike system in Admin Settings.
Feature: When auto-blacklist is OFF, orders are marked as NO_SHOW for record-keeping, but user strikes (noShowCount) do not increment and auto-blacklist is bypassed.
Security & Admin: Enabling Auto-Blacklist (OFF -> ON) requires Admin password confirmation modal and resets all user strikes (noShowCount) to 0.
=== 2.7.0 (2026-07-14) — Performance overhaul for 5000 user/day target ===
Infrastructure: Phase 1 — PostgreSQL tuning (shared_buffers=256MB, max_connections=200, work_mem=16MB)
Infrastructure: Phase 1 — Redis maxmemory=200MB with allkeys-lru eviction
Infrastructure: Phase 1 — PM2 cluster mode (2 workers, --max-old-space-size=768)
Infrastructure: Phase 1 — Frontend nginx gzip optimization (min_length=256, level=6)
Infrastructure: Phase 1 — Reverse proxy nginx keepalive upstreams (32/64)
Infrastructure: Phase 1 — Docker deploy resource limits (4 cores, 8GB budget balanced)
Performance: FIX-H1 — SSE Redis pub/sub cluster awareness (cross-worker events)
Performance: FIX-H1 — SSE connection cap (1000 total, 5 per user), idle timeout (5 min)
Performance: FIX-H1 — SSE heartbeat reduced from 10s to 30s
Performance: FIX-H2 — Cache stampede protection (per-key Promise deduplication)
Performance: FIX-H3 — Blacklist middleware Redis cache (60s TTL) with invalidation
Performance: FIX-H4 — Export cursor-based pagination (prevents OOM on large datasets)
Performance: FIX-M1 — Consolidate Redis clients (cacheService reuses redisService)
Performance: FIX-M2 — Replace KEYS with SCAN in cache delete (non-blocking)
Performance: FIX-M3 — Batch no-show processing (updateMany + transaction)
Performance: FIX-M4 — Batch cancel processing (updateMany + createMany in transaction)
Performance: FIX-M5 — Fire-and-forget push notifications (non-blocking dispatch)
Performance: FIX-M6 — Atomic rate limiter (INCR+EXPIRE, no race condition)
Performance: FIX-L1 — Express body size limit (1MB)
Performance: FIX-L3 — Cutoff middleware double-fetch eliminated
No schema change. No frontend change.
=== 2.6.6 (2026-06-16) — Vendor realtime visibility fix ===

Fix: /api/vendor/weekly-summary and /api/vendor/pickup-stats now return all realtime orders for VENDOR role (joint-fulfillment model). Previously filtered via WeeklyMenu slot set keyed by (weekNumber, dayOfWeek, shiftId) with menuItem.vendorId = self, which dropped any order whose slot the admin had not pinned to the calling vendor's menu — producing empty vendor dashboards when admin had not fully populated the week.
Effect: VENDOR sees the same realtime breakdown as ADMIN (per shift, per canteen, per break time).
Behavior preserved: VENDOR without vendorId binding still 403; ADMIN unchanged; cutoff enforcement unchanged; canteen list still unscoped.
No schema change. No frontend change.
=== AUDIT REMEDIATION 2.6.0 (5-agent audit, 2026-06-13) ===
Security: 5-agent full code audit completed; 140 findings identified, 30+ fixed in this release
--- Wave 0 — Pattern foundations ---
Refactor: Added orderDate.ts helper (parseOrderDate, toOrderDateKey, safeDateFromBody, addDaysToKey) to centralize Fake-UTC date parsing
Refactor: Added blockVendorMiddleware factory; replaced inline VENDOR checks in order/create + bulk
Refactor: Added createOrderWithCapacityCheck + CapacityError; serializable transaction helper for canteen capacity
Refactor: Replaced 14 prisma.settings.findUnique/findFirst call-sites with getCachedSettings()
Refactor: Added frontend dateHelpers.ts (getLocalDateString, addDays, formatOrderDateTime)
Refactor: Frontend formatToWIB rewritten as substring slicer; no more toLocaleString re-conversion for non-WIB viewers
Refactor: Frontend AuthContext request interceptor skips Bearer attach for /auth/refresh, /auth/login, /auth/logout
Fix: SSE leaked EventSource on failed ticket path; closes handle before retry
--- Wave 1 — CRITICAL fixes ---
Security: F-3 Refresh-token rotation + family-revoke (feature-flagged; off by default)
Fix: T-1 Bulk date parser producing wrong Date instant in non-UTC; all paths use Fake-UTC
Fix: T-2/T-3 No-show timing + cancel shift-started rule drifted 7h in non-UTC; aligned with Fake-UTC
Fix: C-R1 Canteen capacity overbooking race; SERIALIZABLE transaction in 3 order create paths
--- Wave 2 — HIGH fixes ---
Security: F-1 IDOR on GET /api/users/:id; ownership check + blacklist field strip
Security: F-2 Vendor scoping on /api/vendor/*; Canteen.vendorId FK + JWT-embedded vendorId
Security: A-4 mustChangePassword cache invalidation on PUT user and reset-password
Fix: D-2 User import counter; created/updated/failed tracked accurately, audit log fires on any change
Infrastructure: I-2 Graceful shutdown; SIGTERM/SIGINT drain SSE, stop schedulers, close services
Infrastructure: I-3 Promoted 3 standalone SQL files to timestamped Prisma migrations
Security: I-6 CORS wildcard fail-fast; comma-list origin support
--- Wave 3 — MED fixes ---
Security: A-5 Rate limit /auth/refresh; apiRateLimitMiddleware('default')
Security: A-7 JWT algorithm pinning (HS256) + issuer (catering-api) on all sign/verify
Audit: D-3 ORDER_NOSHOW + USER_BLACKLISTED logs in order/admin.ts process-noshows path
Performance: D-4 Composite index Order(userId, orderDate, status) for today's order queries
Security: F-6 Multer fileSize 5MB cap on user, order/checkin, message routes
Frontend: FE-5/FE-6 VendorPickupStatsPage, FoodMenuPage, UptimeHistoryPage, DashboardPage use getLocalDateString + addDays
--- Wave 4 — LOW + docs ---
Security: F-4 Menu item ownership; VENDOR scoped to own items, cannot reassign
Frontend: FE-9 Removed 401 hard-redirect race; AuthContext force-logout + route guard own navigation
Feature: Settings.enableTokenRotation admin UI toggle; boolean validation
Docs: CLAUDE.md 'Audit-remediation helpers' section documenting all new patterns
--- Tests ---
Test: 24 unit tests (orderDate + blockVendorMiddleware + capacity + bulk identity)
Tooling: vitest@2.1.9 added as backend devDep; npm test + test:watch scripts
--- Migrations (all forward-only, additive, idempotent) ---
Migration: 20260614_add_refresh_token_rotation (tokenFamilyId, replacedById, revokedReason, Settings.enableTokenRotation)
Migration: 20260614_add_canteen_vendor_id (Canteen.vendorId nullable FK)
Migration: 20260614_promote_add_cutoff_mode (IF NOT EXISTS guards)
Migration: 20260614_promote_add_nik_column (IF NOT EXISTS guards + NIK backfill)
Migration: 20260614_promote_add_sunday_holiday (IF NOT EXISTS guards)
Migration: 20260614_add_order_userId_date_status_index (covering index)
--- Operational ---
Config: New env var ENABLE_TOKEN_ROTATION (default false, see .env.example)
Config: CORS_ORIGIN must be a valid origin; wildcard * now refuses boot
Config: CORS_ORIGIN supports comma-separated list of allowed origins
Docker: docker-compose.yml CORS_ORIGIN now uses ${VAR:?} required form
